positive: A stylized, whimsical scene featuring a cluster of stylized constellations and mythological forest spirits. The main subject is a crescent moon gently cradling glowing, interconnected celestial bodies and woodland sprites. Use a deep indigo and teal color palette, accented by bright gold leaf accents and neon bioluminescent points. The style should be a seamless, high-contrast abstract etching mixed with modern illustrative linework, designed for optimal repeating pattern use. Focus on clean silhouettes, strong directional lines, and a central, balanced composition. Composition should be symmetrical or mandala-like. Cinematic volumetric lighting with depth of field, hyperdetailed, vector art, graphic novel aesthetic, suitable for screen printing.
